compiled_state.title: tests/perf/a0-baseline.json: aggregate_sprint_turn_linux_s threshold raised without explanation comment
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description: The baseline value for aggregate_sprint_turn_linux_s was bumped from 3.5 to 4.5 (+28%) without an accompanying comment explaining what changed. The adjacent comment in benchmark-sprint-workflow.sh still references the old 3.5s value. Update the comment to reflect the new baseline and reason.
